THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2766 MISSION STREET #17, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAY-27-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION UNTIL 5PM ON 5-27-97. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, PLTF ENTITLED TO AMD JUDGMNT FOR $300 BACK RENT PLUS UD DAMAGES OF $10/DAY FROM 4-1-97 THRU 5-27-97, PLUS COSTS OF $165 FOR TOTAL AMD JUDGMNT OF $1035. EACH SIDE BRS OWN COSTS
